title: CKP Telemetry Primitive
description: Defines structured observability for agent behavior: latency, cost, planning, memory, and error rates. Section 5.11. The Telemetry primitive is OPTIONAL at all conformance levels. It MUST NOT capture Chain-of-Thought (CoT) or raw prompt content for data security.

type.description: REQUIRED. Exporter type. 'otlp' for OpenTelemetry-compatible backends (Datadog, Jaeger, etc.).

endpoint.description: Endpoint URL for remote exporters (otlp, webhook).

exporters.description: REQUIRED. At least one telemetry exporter.

tool_calls.description: Emit events for tool invocations (name, duration_ms, status, error code).

memory_ops.description: Emit events for memory store/query/compact operations.

swarm_ops.description: Emit events for swarm delegate/discover/report operations.

lifecycle.description: Emit events for lifecycle transitions (INIT → READY → STOPPED).

errors.description: Emit events for all error responses.

world_model_ops.description: Emit events for world-model prediction, simulation, or update operations.

planning_ops.description: Emit events for plan generation, revision, or conservative fallback decisions.

events.description: Which event categories to emit. All default to the specified value.

token_usage.description: Track input/output token counts per provider call.

cost_usd.description: Track estimated cost per operation in USD.

latency_histogram.description: Emit latency histograms for tool calls and provider requests.

prediction_error.description: Track divergence between predicted and observed outcomes.

retrieval_hit_rate.description: Track how often retrieved memory materially helps task execution.

plan_revision_count.description: Track how many planning revisions occur before final execution.

rate.description: Sampling rate (0.0 = off, 1.0 = all events). Default: 1.0.

strip_arguments.description: If true, tool call arguments are redacted from telemetry events.

strip_results.description: If true, tool call results are redacted from telemetry events.

redaction.description: Data redaction settings. The runtime MUST NEVER emit raw prompts or Chain-of-Thought regardless of these settings.
